'''鈭歸-zh-m''' ('''kawazham''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yeelde|yeelde]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-zh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yeelde|yeelde]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-zh-m
|-
! Lemma
| kawazham
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwazham|thiwazham]] || [[word:jiwazham|jiwazham]] || [[word:shiwazham|shiwazham]] || [[word:kiwazham|kiwazham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwazham|thuthuwazham]] || [[word:jujuwazham|jujuwazham]] || [[word:shushuwazham|shushuwazham]] || [[word:kukuwazham|kukuwazham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwazham|thuwazham]] || [[word:juwazham|juwazham]] || [[word:shuwazham|shuwazham]] || [[word:kuwazham|kuwazham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwazham|thuwazham]] || [[word:juwazham|juwazham]] || [[word:shuwazham|shuwazham]] || [[word:kuwazham|kuwazham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewazham|thewazham]] || [[word:jewazham|jewazham]] || [[word:shewazham|shewazham]] || [[word:kewazham|kewazham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowazham|thothowazham]] || [[word:jojowazham|jojowazham]] || [[word:shoshowazham|shoshowazham]] || [[word:kokowazham|kokowazham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowazham|thowazham]] || [[word:jowazham|jowazham]] || [[word:showazham|showazham]] || [[word:kowazham|kowazham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowazham|thowazham]] || [[word:jowazham|jowazham]] || [[word:showazham|showazham]] || [[word:kowazham|kowazham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙wazham|th忙wazham]] || [[word:j忙wazham|j忙wazham]] || [[word:sh忙wazham|sh忙wazham]] || [[word:k忙wazham|k忙wazham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawazham|thathawazham]] || [[word:jajawazham|jajawazham]] || [[word:shashawazham|shashawazham]] || [[word:kakawazham|kakawazham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawazham|thawazham]] || [[word:jawazham|jawazham]] || [[word:shawazham|shawazham]] || [[word:kawazham|kawazham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawazham|thawazham]] || [[word:jawazham|jawazham]] || [[word:shawazham|shawazham]] || [[word:kawazham|kawazham]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawazham|shawazham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawazham|goshawazham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawazham|gokishawazham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawazhamn眉|shawazhamn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawazhamnkn眉|goshawazhamnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawazhamn眉|gokishawazhamn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawazhamsh毛|shawazhamsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawazhamnksh毛|goshawazhamnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawazhamsh毛|gokishawazhamsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawazhamro|shawazhamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawazhamnkro|goshawazhamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawazhamro|gokishawazhamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawazhamu|shawazhamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawazhamnkmu|goshawazhamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawazhamu|gokishawazhamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawazhamsher|shawazhamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawazhamnksher|goshawazhamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawazhamsher|gokishawazhamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawazhamng|shawazhamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawazhamnkng|goshawazhamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawazhamng|gokishawazhamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawazhamya|shawazhamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawazhamnkya|goshawazhamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawazhamya|gokishawazhamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawazhamyam|shawazhamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawazhamnkyam|goshawazhamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawazhamyam|gokishawazhamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawazhamn眉sh毛|shawazhamn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawazhamnkn眉sh毛|goshawazhamnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawazhamn眉sh毛|gokishawazhamn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawazhamn眉ro|shawazhamn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawazhamnkn眉ro|goshawazhamnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawazhamn眉ro|gokishawazhamn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawazhamn眉mu|shawazhamn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawazhamnkn眉mu|goshawazhamnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawazhamn眉mu|gokishawazhamn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawazhamsh毛n眉|shawazhamsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawazhamnksh毛n眉|goshawazhamnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawazhamsh毛n眉|gokishawazhamsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawazhamsh毛ro|shawazhamsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawazhamnksh毛ro|goshawazhamnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawazhamsh毛ro|gokishawazhamsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawazhamsh毛mu|shawazhamsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawazhamnksh毛mu|goshawazhamnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawazhamsh毛mu|gokishawazhamsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawazhamron眉|shawazhamron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawazhamnkron眉|goshawazhamnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawazhamron眉|gokishawazhamron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawazhamrosh毛|shawazhamrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawazhamnkrosh毛|goshawazhamnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawazhamrosh毛|gokishawazhamrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawazhamromu|shawazhamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawazhamnkromu|goshawazhamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawazhamromu|gokishawazhamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawazhamun眉|shawazhamun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawazhamnkmun眉|goshawazhamnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawazhamun眉|gokishawazhamun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawazhamush毛|shawazhamush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawazhamnkmush毛|goshawazhamnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawazhamush毛|gokishawazhamush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawazhamuro|shawazhamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawazhamnkmuro|goshawazhamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawazhamuro|gokishawazhamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
